title: Democrats see Senate control within reach — but some big hurdles remain
description: The political terrain remains forbidding, but the president’s crumbling approval ratings and the Iran war’s weight on the economy offer the party an opening.

title: Undeterred by polls and courts, Trump honors ballroom donors at White House
description: Amid the war with Iran, surging gas prices and backlash to his immigration policies, the president continues to dedicate extensive time to his signature project.

title: Federal workers had their annual award show. Many were too afraid to show up.
description: A year after the U.S. DOGE Service dramatically slashed the civil service, government workers are still spooked about getting on the Trump administration’s bad side.

title: Rubio visits Rome aiming to repair White House ties with Pope Leo
description: Relations between the United States and the Vatican are at a low point over President Trump’s attacks on Pope Leo, who is a leading critic of the war in Iran.

title: Border czar promises 'mass deportations are coming' to fulfill Trump's promises
description: The remarks contrast with Border Czar Tom Homan's softer messaging earlier this year, after two U.S. citizens were killed by immigration officials in Minneapolis.

title: Campaign staffers tell NPR they make 'thousands' betting on their own candidates
description: Campaign staffers are turning private polling data into personal paydays. They describe election prediction market as a "Wild West" for staffers.

title: In new poll, Americans voice broad bipartisan support for age caps in Congress
description: The vast majority of Americans — 8 in 10 — say there should be age caps for members of Congress, as well as term limits, according to the latest NPR/PBS News/Marist Poll.

title: Alabama's legislature poised to adopt new congressional map after SCOTUS ruling
description: The Alabama Legislature has spent the week debating the state's congressional maps. Democratic lawmakers have argued their voting powers are being diluted because of a Supreme Court ruling.

title: Judge denies request to return 2020 ballots seized from Fulton County, Georgia
description: The FBI’s seizure of Fulton County’s voting materials has stoked alarm among election officials and democracy advocates.

title: Court releases purported suicide note from Jeffrey Epstein
description: The note, which was discovered by Epstein’s former cellmate, had been under seal for years. No court or investigative agency has vouched for its authenticity.

title: FBI raids business of state Sen. L. Louise Lucas, a key Virginia Democrat
description: The offices of state Sen. L. Louise Lucas, a Democrat, as well as a cannabis dispensary she co-owns were raided. The exact nature and targets of the probe remain unclear.

title: Lutnick testifies before congressional panel investigating Epstein
description: The commerce secretary participated in a voluntary interview with the House Oversight Committee to explain his ties to the late financier and convicted sex offender.

title: Sen. Susan Collins discloses ‘essential tremor’ diagnosis to explain shaking
description: The Maine senator who is up for reelection this year described her condition as ‘extremely common’ with ‘absolutely no impact on my ability to do my job.’

title: Justice Department launches civil rights probe into prosecutor in Virginia
description: Fairfax County Commonwealth’s Attorney Steve Descano (D) has been under attack from Republicans over his handling of cases involving immigrant defendants.

title: Secretary Howard Lutnick is questioned by House lawmakers over his Epstein ties
description: Lutnick said last year that he cut ties with Epstein, his former neighbor, in 2005. But the Epstein files indicate that the two kept in contact, including for a 2012 lunch on Epstein's private island.

title: Trump hosts UFC fighters in Oval Office, touts Iran progress
description: The unusual White House scene highlighted President Donald Trump’s diverse set of priorities as he juggles a war with event planning.

title: Republicans want to add $1 billion for Trump's ballroom security to ICE funding plan
description: Republicans in Congress are proposing $1 billion in funding for security for President Trump's White House ballroom as part of their partisan plan to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

title: Trump lashes out at Pope Leo again ahead of Rubio trip to Rome
description: The criticism of the pontiff’s stance on Iran highlighted what Vatican officials have described as an unprecedented low in relations with the United States.

title: How Silicon Valley's new tech right has profited by aligning with MAGA
description: Atlantic writer George Packer discusses how tech venture capitalists, who are heavily invested in AI and cryptocurrency, aligned with Trump and influenced policies related to their own investments.

title: Poll finds broad rejection of religion-related messages from Trump, Hegseth
description: Americans rate Pope Leo positively but are deeply critical of the president’s social media post that appeared to depict him as Jesus, the Post-ABC-Ipsos poll found.

title: After defying Trump, a Republican lawmaker hangs on by a thread
description: Republicans in Indiana’s Senate tested voters’ tolerance for defying the president. Most lost in primaries amid a wave of threats, campaign cash and popular backlash.

title: The pro-Israel political consensus is collapsing in both parties
description: On the campaign trail and elsewhere, the alliance has gone from a bipartisan consensus to a subject of fierce debate among Republicans and Democrats alike.

title: 4 takeaways from the Indiana and Ohio primaries
description: Primaries in Indiana and Ohio reinforced President Donald Trump’s power in the GOP and set the stakes for several top-tier midterm races.

title: Iran is reviewing a U.S. proposal as Trump threatens renewed bombing if it doesn't agree
description: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman said negotiators are assessing the Trump administration's latest proposal and will relate a response to mediating country Pakistan.

title: Poll: Trump blamed for gas prices as Democrats gain midterm edge
description: A new NPR/PBS News/Marist poll finds strong support for Democrats this midterm season. It also shows increasing concern about the war in Iran and the economy, particularly the price of gas.

title: Trump-backed challengers win in Indiana as Democratic voters show enthusiasm in Ohio
description: President Trump successfully ousted several Indiana Republicans who blocked a redistricting push in that state, but growing dissatisfaction with Trump's agenda gave Democrats an opening in Ohio.

title: Activist who gave out fliers with Stephen Miller’s address won’t face charges
description: A prosecutor cited “insufficient evidence” of an intent to harass the White House aide by distributing leaflets in his Northern Virginia neighborhood.

title: In a first, FDA authorizes fruit-flavored vapes for adults
description: The move marks a shift after the FDA for years worked aggressively to regulate flavored vapes. The move came after President Donald Trump reportedly pressed the FDA commissioner to authorize the products.

title: Vance makes Iowa debut, joining other potential presidential hopefuls
description: The state will play a key role if the vice president decides to run for president in 2028, and other potential GOP candidates have visited in recent months.

title: White House correspondents’ dinner suspect indicted on 4 felony charges
description: A grand jury charged Cole Tomas Allen with attempting to assassinate President Donald Trump, assaulting a Secret Service officer with a shotgun and other offenses.

title: Publishers sue Meta, claiming it violated copyrights in training AI with their books
description: The plaintiffs allege that Meta CEO and founder Mark Zuckerberg “personally authorized and actively encouraged” copyright infringement.

title: GOP Rep. Chuck Edwards faces ethics probe over conduct toward female aides
description: A spokesman for the North Carolina congressman said he welcomes a chance to refute the allegations.

title: Democrats see opening on abortion as Supreme Court returns it to spotlight
description: A legal dispute that could imperil access to the abortion pill mifepristone adds urgency to an issue that had moved to the back burner in Democratic politics.

title: GOP offers $1B for White House security, sparking dispute over ballroom
description: Senate Republicans maintain their budget reconciliation proposal would authorize security construction, but not Trump’s ballroom. The White House disagrees.
